knowledge_base.answer: To add funds, go to the 'Add Funds' page. CRITICAL: You must ensure your funding details (Payment Nodes) are saved and up-to-date before depositing. Payments sent to unregistered numbers cannot be automatically tracked or credited to your wallet.

If your payment is not reflecting, please verify that you sent the money from one of your 'Registered Funding Channels' listed in your profile. If it has been over 10 minutes, please contact support with your transaction code.
You can change your password by scrolling down to the 'Modify Security Gateway' section on the Add Funds or Dashboard page. You will need your current password to set a new one.
To update your funding numbers, go to the 'Modify Account Profile' section. You can add up to 2 Alternative Funding Nodes. Remember to click 'Save Profile Changes' before making a deposit!
You can check your live account balance at the very top of the 'Add Funds' page in the green header, or in the 'Account Wallet Information' card below it.
Hello! Welcome to Unasemeje Support. I can help you with adding funds, updating your profile, checking payment statuses, or changing your password. What do you need help with today?
We currently accept payments via the Paynecta checkout portal integrated on the Add Funds page. You can use M-Pesa or other supported mobile money methods directly through the secure portal.
